headline: KBW Sees Mixed Fundamentals in Life Insurance, Starts Aflac (AFL) at Market Perform
summary: Aflac Incorporated (NYSE:AFL) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio for Income: 15 Stocks to Invest In. On March 26, Keefe Bruyette & Woods re-initiated coverage of Aflac Incorporated (NYSE:AFL) with a Market Perform rating and a $113 price target. The analyst said the life insurance sector shows a mixed fundamental picture. Companies have reduced liability […]

headline: Will Aflac's (AFL) New Hybrid Long-Term Care Rider Reshape Its Aging-Demographics Investment Narrative?
summary: In March 2026, Aflac Incorporated added a hybrid long-term care rider to its Group Life Term to 120 product, offering flexible benefits that can be used for home- or facility-based care and remain portable after employment ends, though availability varies by state. This innovation targets the growing long-term care needs of an aging U.S. population, giving consumers the option to use life insurance benefits during their lifetime rather than only after death. Next, we’ll examine how this...
